displayTitle: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #12: Battleground: Tatooine, Part 4
synopsis: A handful of Tatooine outlaws and a mountain full of Imperial weaponry are a deadly combination—deadly enough to make allies of X-wing Rogue Squadron and a troop of Imperial Special Forces! The hot desert sands really heat up in the explosive conclusion to Battleground: Tatooine, as Wedge and crew attempt to take back the galaxy, one planet at a time!
title: X-Wing Rogue Squadron #12: Battleground: Tatooine, Part 4
